description:
The quiz assesses knowledge of core data structures such as stacks, lists, and trees, as well as algorithmic concepts and time‑complexity analysis. It is moderately challenging, suitable for learners who have completed introductory coursework and need to solidify their understanding. The tone is instructional and supportive, guiding participants through a series of 20 focused questions.
Topics: Stacks, Lists, Trees, Algorithm fundamentals, Time complexity, Big O notation
Audience: Students and early‑career developers who have completed an introductory course in data structures and algorithms and want to test and reinforce their skills.
